page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c9ae.32xlarge is a compute-optimized instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by an AMD EPYC 9T95 processor running at a base frequency of 2.25 GHz. The instance provides 128 dedicated physical cores with 1 thread per core, resulting in 128 vCPUs. This 1:1 mapping of physical cores to vCPUs ensures dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading overhead.

The instance is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, providing a memory-to-core ratio of 2.0 GB per core. It does not include local NVMe or SSD storage, meaning all storage must be network-attached. For network connectivity, the instance offers a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps. It does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses or GPU hardware.

Given the high core count and dedicated CPU allocation, this instance is designed for compute-intensive workloads that benefit from parallel processing and high network throughput. The 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio makes it highly cost-efficient for workloads that require raw CPU power over massive memory footprints. Suitable workloads include high-performance computing, batch processing, scientific modeling, and large-scale web serving.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c9ae.32xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance powered by an AMD EPYC 9T95 processor. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this x86_64 instance features 128 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, delivering 128 vCPUs at a clock speed of 2.25 GHz. It is configured with 256.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core. The instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying entirely on network-attached storage. It provides a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps. This hardware profile is optimized for compute-heavy workloads such as high-performance computing, batch processing, and parallelized simulation tasks where dedicated CPU execution is critical.

tagline: A high-core-density compute instance featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors and high-speed network bandwidth for parallelized workloads.

256.0 GB of system memory providing 2.0 GB of RAM per core
64 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput data transfer
Zero local storage configuration requiring network-attached storage options
Optimized for high-performance computing, batch processing, and simulations
